title: New Jersey DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for New Jersey DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (NJDOL Division of DDS), verified class titles (Claims Adjudicator; Senior Claims Adjudicator CSC Job Spec #64947/64947C; Claims Adjudicator Supervisor), NJ Range+Step pay structure, Glassdoor estimated ranges ($53,560–$68,777), the CWA Local 1036 / IFPTE Local 195 2023-2027 CBA highlights (3.5%/yr, new Step 11), and gaps (official salary-schedule PDFs unreadable; union jurisdiction unconfirmed). Companion to NJ/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: CWA Local 1036 (likely; IFPTE Local 195 possible) / NJ Civil Service Commission; NJ DOL Division of Disability Determination Services
source.title: NJ DDS salary research notes (CSC Job Spec #64947 + CWA/IFPTE 2023-2027 CBA; Glassdoor estimates)

notes: Computed: examiner/supervisor titles (CSC Job Spec #64947) and the CWA/IFPTE 2023-2027 CBA terms are confirmed, but salary figures are Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter aggregates — the official CWA 1036 / IFPTE 195 salary-schedule PDFs were unreadable via web tools and exact Range/Step is unverified. Union jurisdiction (CWA vs IFPTE) for DDS Claims Adjudicators unconfirmed.
